method: Mistral first-party API pricing (https://mistral.ai/pricing/api), prices already in USD. EU-resident (FR). Fetched fresh 2026-07-01: all 6 tracked flagship models unchanged (Mistral Large 3 0.50/1.50, Mistral Medium 3.5 1.50/7.50, Magistral Medium 2.00/5.00, Mistral Small 4 0.15/0.60, Codestral 0.30/0.90, Devstral 2 0.40/2.00). La Plateforme also lists Magistral Small, Devstral Small 2, Ministral 3 (3B/8B/14B), Voxtral, Mistral NeMo, Mixtral 8x7B/8x22B, not tracked here to preserve this file's flagship-only scope.
